hooks.prompt: BLOCKING SAVE BEFORE COMPACTION: This is mandatory — do ALL of these before allowing compaction: 1) Scan recent conversation for evolve signals and append unlogged ones to sessions/evolve_signals.md. 2) Update sessions/scratchpad.md with FULL current task state, key decisions, dead ends, and files being edited — this is the only bridge across compaction. 3) Update memory/L1_essential.md 'Current Focus' section. 4) If any plan is in progress, write the current step number and plan state to scratchpad. 5) Update scratchpad 'Context' field to 'POST-COMPACTION (~15%)' so the next phase knows budget was reset. 6) Write a 1-line checkpoint to scratchpad: 'COMPACTION CHECKPOINT: {what was being done} at {step}'. Only after ALL steps complete should compaction proceed.
